perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a close-up of a female performer in a black-and-white ruffled dress on a large LED screen, then cuts to a wide shot of her on stage with pyrotechnic sparklers shooting upward. A small circular inset in the upper right displays a female audience member wearing a glowing pink headband. (2) The performer is shown gesturing to the audience while singing. (3) A shot of another female performer with long blonde hair on the screen is followed by a wide panoramic view of a massive stadium audience holding thousands of pink lightsticks. (4) The first performer is seen again in a close-up on the screen while rapping. (5) A third female performer with red hair appears on the screen, singing with an emotional expression.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat K-pop track begins with electronic beats and high-energy female vocals singing in Korean and English. Heavy ambient crowd cheering is audible. (2) The audio transitions to a mid-tempo melodic song with acoustic guitar elements and clear female singing. (3) The crowd noise increases significantly as a bass-heavy beat kicks in. (4) Rhythmic female rap vocals are heard over a punchy instrumental. (5) The audio concludes with a high-pitched, melodic vocal solo from a different female singer.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative hook text at the bottom reads: "當你追星用iPhone 17 新功能雙重鏡頭拍攝" (When you use iPhone 17's new dual-lens shooting feature while chasing stars). The tone is humorous and relatable to fan culture.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Performance Montage -> Audience Shot -> Performance Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 3 main idols on screen/stage, 1 fan in the PiP window, and a massive stadium crowd.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The performers wear stylized black and white corset dresses with ruffles; the fan in the PiP wears casual attire and a pink glowing headband.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A massive concert stage with giant LED screens, strobe lights, and pyrotechnic fountains. The background shows a packed stadium filled with glowing pink lightsticks.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Intense concert lighting with strobe effects and pink neon hues

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a concert vlog snippet intended to share the excitement and visual spectacle of a BLACKPINK concert. By using a 'fan-reaction' inset alongside high-quality stage footage, it creates an immersive experience for the viewer. The humorous text about a fictional 'iPhone 17' feature acts as a social media hook to increase engagement through relatability and humor.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The mention of iPhone 17 is a humorous social media meme and not an official product placement.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of PiP (Picture-in-Picture) to contrast idol performance with fan reaction.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Highlights the 'Pink Ocean' lightstick phenomenon and the intense parasocial connection between K-pop idols and their global fanbase.
